query: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `toc_sessions` (`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL, `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL, `status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft', `week_date` timestamp NOT NULL, `summary` text, `main_constraint` text, `recommendations` text, `completed_at` timestamp NULL, `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()), `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT `toc_sessions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`))
